# MyZoneTime — World Clock & Time Zone Tools
> myzonetime.com is a free, ad-supported world clock and time zone platform serving 500+ cities.

## Core Tools
- / — Home with world clock search and live weather
- /world-clock — Live time grid for 500+ cities with search and favourites
- /timezone-converter — Side-by-side time zone comparison with shareable URLs
- /meeting-planner — Overlapping business hours finder for up to 5 cities
- /hijri-calendar — Islamic (Hijri) calendar with Gregorian comparison
- /time-difference-calculator — Hour difference between any two cities, DST-aware
- /date-calculator — Days/weeks/months between two dates
- /work-hours-calculator — Total work hours and payroll calculator
- /stopwatch — Millisecond-precision stopwatch with lap timer
- /timer — Countdown timer with audio alert
- /countdown — Event countdown with days, hours, minutes, seconds

## City Pages (live clock, weather, FAQs)
- /dubai — Dubai, UAE (GST, UTC+4)
- /london — London, UK (GMT/BST, UTC+0/+1)
- /new-york — New York, USA (EST/EDT, UTC-5/-4)
- /tokyo — Tokyo, Japan (JST, UTC+9)
- /singapore — Singapore (SGT, UTC+8)
- /sydney — Sydney, Australia (AEST/AEDT, UTC+10/+11)
- /riyadh — Riyadh, Saudi Arabia (AST, UTC+3)
- /abu-dhabi — Abu Dhabi, UAE (GST, UTC+4)

## Embeddable Widget
- /embed/world-clock — Embeddable iframe world clock widget (no ads, clean UI)
